title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Risk Brief: Capstone Defense
summary: Operate a reusable repository template without letting gates rot or overwhelm contributors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates capstone defense increment in a reusable quality-gated repository template. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend each gate by risk, ownership, feedback time, evidence, and maintenance plan.
Offer risk-based language and project profiles instead of one universal template.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Capstone Defense evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-capstone-defense-1erk5j: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Capstone Defense into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-capstone-defense-1erk5j:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
